title: Dhum Dhadaka
subTitle: Mahesh seeks to wed his haughty employer's daughter, Gauri, but faces opposition from her father. He takes his friend Ashok's help to woo her father, but Ashok is in love with Gauri's sister.

subTitle: A farmer returns to his village to resume farming and help others improve crop production. Yet he is unable to find a wife due to his occupation.
